top_signals.title: Hormuz Ship Insurance Demand Drops as Owners Get Nervous
top_signals.summary: London marine insurers have been seeing fewer inquiries for journeys to transit the Strait of Hormuz and some said the cost of cover had risen, in a sign of growing caution from shipowners as the US and Iran exchange attacks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Repricing of 30-Year Treasury Yield Has Just Begun, PGIM’s Peters Says
top_signals.summary: The return of the 30-year US Treasury yield above 5% is prompting investors to rethink what they consider an attractive level, according to PGIM’s Gregory Peters.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
